releaseNotes: v0.29.4 — Alex's 2026-05-27 feedback batch. 3 bugs fixed: (1) zone-audit scan pop-up no longer 'loses' the expiration date on first save — the live scan list now refreshes from the notifier the moment the dialog closes, so the first save is honest; (2) no more spurious 'manual review' pop-up on cleanly-parsed 2D barcodes whose catalog had been populated by a recent sync replay or FDA lookup; (3) dashboard today tile renamed 'cycle-counts' → 'retired' so 6 items retired during one audit no longer reads as 6 separate audit sessions. 4 UX improvements: Expiring Meds rows now show the zone with a pin icon on its own line; Expiring Meds + Zone Audit no longer duplicated between the top bar and the three-dots menu; Zone Audit promoted to a dedicated top-right AppBar button; 6-month + 1-year options added to zone-audit frequency picker. 1 label fix: DYMO 450 1×2⅛" label margin bumped from ~1mm to ~1.5mm so the first character no longer clips against the driver's reserved print margin. No schema change. No sync op-type change. Auto-updater rolls v0.29.3 → v0.29.4 on next launch. 597 tests passing.
